public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as market broker.
manner: Treats exchange as a social instrument as much as an economic one, reading appetite and hesitation alike. In Psanan, that reads as someone heat-forged, direct, and honor-conscious, shaped by household authority and volcanic endurance, and the habits of a market broker still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of market broker in and around Ashforge Citadel, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Ashforge Citadel workable through the obligations of market broker while managing the immediate pressure of house rivalry in Psanan.
hidden_pressure: Must read timing, trust, and supply pressure early enough that a market problem does not become a civic one. Around Ashforge Citadel, that usually means carrying house rivalry, forge accidents, ashfall damage without letting the role of market broker visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Ashra Ashvein will trade route, scarcity, or faction insight once the party resolves a commercial problem others cannot touch openly.
Ashra Ashvein needs help protecting a shipment, recovering leverage, or stabilizing exchange around Ashforge Citadel before trust collapses.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Textiles, tokens, tally habits, and practiced bargaining poise make Ashra Ashvein read as someone who lives by exchange and reputation. In Ashforge Citadel, this lands inside a public field already shaped by Great House Citadel Circle, Forge Dedication Halls.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Ashforge Citadel: markets, counting tables, depots, ports, inns, or contract rooms
who_avoids_them: those who waste time without value
